content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (reviewer@focusshield.example / Gv7kQz2mNp) but notes.txt just says "n/a" with no explanation of app flow, fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt:1
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need clear guidance on how to reach gated features like the subscription paywall in PaywallView.swift, especially since App Blocking/Screen Time features may require additional setup permissions. Having valid credentials but a placeholder "n/a" note leaves reviewers to guess how to unlock premium features or test the subscription flow, which risks a rejection for insufficient information. Replace notes.txt with concrete steps: e.g., "Sign in with the credentials above, then tap Subscribe on the paywall — sandbox purchase is auto-approved / use promo code X" plus any Screen Time authorization steps.
